english: What is cloud computing and how is it used by companies in India?
hindi: भारत में कंपनियों द्वारा क्लाउड कंप्यूटिंग का उपयोग कैसे किया जाता है और यह क्या है?
tamil: இந்தியாவில் நிறுவனங்களால் கணனி நடுநிலை எவ்வாறு பயன்படுத்தப்படுகிறது மற்றும் இது என்ன என்பதை விளக்கவும்
vietnamese: Nền tảng điện toán đám mây là gì và nó được sử dụng như thế nào bởi các công ty ở Ấn Độ?
correct_answer: Cloud computing is a model for delivering computing services over the internet, allowing companies to store and process data remotely. Many Indian companies use cloud computing to reduce costs and improve scalability.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating that cloud computing is a new technology that only emerged in the past few years, or by refusing to answer because it doesn't have enough information about Indian companies' usage patterns.
